content.thinking:
사용자가 WezTerm 터미널 설정을 하고 싶어합니다. 먼저 현재 WezTerm 설정 파일이 있는지 확인하고, 사용자의 요구사항을 파악해야 합니다.

WezTerm 설정 파일은 보통 `~/.wezterm.lua` 또는 `~/.config/wezterm/wezterm.lua`에 있습니다. Windows에서는 `C:\Users\Administrator\.wezterm.lua`가 될 수 있습니다.

content.thinking:
사용자가 기본 전체 설정을 원합니다. WezTerm 20240203 버전이 설치되어 있고, 기존 설정 파일은 없습니다. D2Coding 폰트를 사용하고, 다크테마, 탭, 키바인딩, 투명도 등 종합 설정을 해드리겠습니다.

Windows에서 WezTerm 설정 파일 위치는 `C:\Users\Administrator\.wezterm.lua`입니다.

input.content:
local wezterm = require 'wezterm'
local config = wezterm.config_builder()

-- 폰트
config.font = wezterm.font('D2Coding', { weight = 'Regular' })
config.font_size = 12.0
config.line_height = 1.1

-- 컬러 스킴 (다크)
config.color_scheme = 'Tokyo Night'

-- 창 설정
config.window_background_opacity = 0.92
config.window_padding = { left = 8, right = 8, top = 4, bottom = 4 }
config.initial_cols = 130
config.initial_rows = 35
config.window_decorations = 'RESIZE'

-- 탭바
config.enable_tab_bar = true
config.use_fancy_tab_bar = false
config.tab_bar_at_bottom = true
config.hide_tab_bar_if_only_one_tab = true
config.tab_max_width = 30

-- 커서
config.default_cursor_style = 'SteadyBar'
config.cursor_blink_rate = 500

-- 스크롤
config.scrollback_lines = 10000
config.enable_scroll_bar = false

-- 기본 쉘 (PowerShell 7)
config.default_prog = { 'pwsh', '-NoLogo' }

-- 키 바인딩
config.keys = {
  -- 탭 관리
  { key = 't', mods = 'CTRL|SHIFT', action = wezterm.action.SpawnTab 'CurrentPaneDomain' },
  { key = 'w', mods = 'CTRL|SHIFT', action = wezterm.action.CloseCurrentTab { confirm = true } },
  -- 탭 이동
  { key = 'LeftArrow',  mods = 'CTRL|SHIFT', action = wezterm.action.ActivateTabRelative(-1) },
  { key = 'RightArrow', mods = 'CTRL|SHIFT', action = wezterm.action.ActivateTabRelative(1) },
  -- 패널 분할
  { key = '|', mods = 'CTRL|SHIFT', action = wezterm.action.SplitHorizontal { domain = 'CurrentPaneDomain' } },
  { key = '_', mods = 'CTRL|SHIFT', action = wezterm.action.SplitVertical { domain = 'CurrentPaneDomain' } },
  -- 패널 이동
  { key = 'LeftArrow',  mods = 'ALT', action = wezterm.action.ActivatePaneDirection 'Left' },
  { key = 'RightArrow', mods = 'ALT', action = wezterm.action.ActivatePaneDirection 'Right' },
  { key = 'UpArrow',    mods = 'ALT', action = wezterm.action.ActivatePaneDirection 'Up' },
  { key = 'DownArrow',  mods = 'ALT', action = wezterm.action.ActivatePaneDirection 'Down' },
  -- 폰트 크기
  { key = '=', mods = 'CTRL', action = wezterm.action.IncreaseFontSize },
  { key = '-', mods = 'CTRL', action = wezterm.action.DecreaseFontSize },
  { key = '0', mods = 'CTRL', action = wezterm.action.ResetFontSize },
  -- 복사/붙여넣기
  { key = 'c', mods = 'CTRL|SHIFT', action = wezterm.action.CopyTo 'Clipboard' },
  { key = 'v', mods = 'CTRL|SHIFT', action = wezterm.action.PasteFrom 'Clipboard' },
}

-- Ctrl+1~9로 탭 직접 이동
for i = 1, 9 do
  table.insert(config.keys, {
    key = tostring(i), mods = 'ALT', action = wezterm.action.ActivateTab(i - 1),
  })
end

return config

  { key = 'w', mods = 'CTRL|SHIFT', action = wezterm.action.CloseCurrentTab { confirm = true } },
  -- 탭 이동

  -- 패널 이동

  { key = 'RightArrow', mods = 'ALT', action = wezterm.action.ActivatePaneDirection 'Right' },
  { key = 'UpArrow',    mods = 'ALT', action = wezterm.action.ActivatePaneDirection 'Up' },
  { key = 'DownArrow',  mods = 'ALT', action = wezterm.action.ActivatePaneDirection 'Down' },

  })
end

return config

content.text: Ctrl+C/V 복붙 유지 + 속도 최적화 설정으로 수정하겠습니다.

input.content:
local wezterm = require 'wezterm'
local config = wezterm.config_builder()

-- 폰트
config.font = wezterm.font('D2Coding', { weight = 'Regular' })
config.font_size = 12.0
config.line_height = 1.1

-- 컬러 스킴 (다크)
config.color_scheme = 'Tokyo Night'

-- 창 설정
config.window_background_opacity = 0.92
config.window_padding = { left = 8, right = 8, top = 4, bottom = 4 }
config.initial_cols = 130
config.initial_rows = 35
config.window_decorations = 'RESIZE'

-- 탭바
config.enable_tab_bar = true
config.use_fancy_tab_bar = false
config.tab_bar_at_bottom = true
config.hide_tab_bar_if_only_one_tab = true
config.tab_max_width = 30

-- 커서
config.default_cursor_style = 'SteadyBar'
config.cursor_blink_rate = 500

-- 스크롤
config.scrollback_lines = 10000
config.enable_scroll_bar = false

-- 속도 최적화
config.front_end = 'WebGpu'                    -- GPU 가속 렌더링
config.webgpu_power_preference = 'HighPerformance'
config.animation_fps = 1                        -- 불필요한 애니메이션 최소화
config.cursor_blink_ease_in = 'Constant'
config.cursor_blink_ease_out = 'Constant'
config.enable_wayland = false
config.max_fps = 120

-- 기본 쉘 (PowerShell 7)
config.default_prog = { 'pwsh', '-NoLogo' }

-- 키 바인딩
config.keys = {
  -- 탭 관리
  { key = 't', mods = 'CTRL|SHIFT', action = wezterm.action.SpawnTab 'CurrentPaneDomain' },
  { key = 'w', mods = 'CTRL|SHIFT', action = wezterm.action.CloseCurrentTab { confirm = true } },
  -- 탭 이동
  { key = 'LeftArrow',  mods = 'CTRL|SHIFT', action = wezterm.action.ActivateTabRelative(-1) },
  { key = 'RightArrow', mods = 'CTRL|SHIFT', action = wezterm.action.ActivateTabRelative(1) },
  -- 패널 분할
  { key = '|', mods = 'CTRL|SHIFT', action = wezterm.action.SplitHorizontal { domain = 'CurrentPaneDomain' } },
  { key = '_', mods = 'CTRL|SHIFT', action = wezterm.action.SplitVertical { domain = 'CurrentPaneDomain' } },
  -- 패널 이동
  { key = 'LeftArrow',  mods = 'ALT', action = wezterm.action.ActivatePaneDirection 'Left' },
  { key = 'RightArrow', mods = 'ALT', action = wezterm.action.ActivatePaneDirection 'Right' },
  { key = 'UpArrow',    mods = 'ALT', action = wezterm.action.ActivatePaneDirection 'Up' },
  { key = 'DownArrow',  mods = 'ALT', action = wezterm.action.ActivatePaneDirection 'Down' },
  -- 폰트 크기
  { key = '=', mods = 'CTRL', action = wezterm.action.IncreaseFontSize },
  { key = '-', mods = 'CTRL', action = wezterm.action.DecreaseFontSize },
  { key = '0', mods = 'CTRL', action = wezterm.action.ResetFontSize },
}

-- Ctrl+C / Ctrl+V: 선택 영역 있으면 복사, 없으면 원래 Ctrl+C(SIGINT) 동작
config.keys[#config.keys + 1] = {
  key = 'c', mods = 'CTRL',
  action = wezterm.action_callback(function(window, pane)
    local sel = window:get_selection_text_for_pane(pane)
    if sel and #sel > 0 then
      window:perform_action(wezterm.action.CopyTo 'Clipboard', pane)
    else
      window:perform_action(wezterm.action.SendKey { key = 'c', mods = 'CTRL' }, pane)
    end
  end),
}

config.keys[#config.keys + 1] = {
  key = 'v', mods = 'CTRL',
  action = wezterm.action.PasteFrom 'Clipboard',
}

-- Alt+1~9로 탭 직접 이동
for i = 1, 9 do
  table.insert(config.keys, {
    key = tostring(i), mods = 'ALT', action = wezterm.action.ActivateTab(i - 1),
  })
end

return config

local wezterm = require 'wezterm'
local config = wezterm.config_builder()

-- 폰트
config.font = wezterm.font('D2Coding', { weight = 'Regular' })
config.font_size = 12.0
config.line_height = 1.1

-- 컬러 스킴 (다크)
config.color_scheme = 'Tokyo Night'

-- 창 설정
config.window_background_opacity = 0.92
config.window_padding = { left = 8, right = 8, top = 4, bottom = 4 }
config.initial_cols = 130
config.initial_rows = 35
config.window_decorations = 'RESIZE'

-- 탭바
config.enable_tab_bar = true
config.use_fancy_tab_bar = false
config.tab_bar_at_bottom = true
config.hide_tab_bar_if_only_one_tab = true
config.tab_max_width = 30

-- 커서
config.default_cursor_style = 'SteadyBar'
config.cursor_blink_rate = 500

-- 스크롤
config.scrollback_lines = 10000
config.enable_scroll_bar = false

-- 기본 쉘 (PowerShell 7)
config.default_prog = { 'pwsh', '-NoLogo' }

-- 키 바인딩
config.keys = {
  -- 탭 관리
  { key = 't', mods = 'CTRL|SHIFT', action = wezterm.action.SpawnTab 'CurrentPaneDomain' },
  { key = 'w', mods = 'CTRL|SHIFT', action = wezterm.action.CloseCurrentTab { confirm = true } },
  -- 탭 이동
  { key = 'LeftArrow',  mods = 'CTRL|SHIFT', action = wezterm.action.ActivateTabRelative(-1) },
  { key = 'RightArrow', mods = 'CTRL|SHIFT', action = wezterm.action.ActivateTabRelative(1) },
  -- 패널 분할
  { key = '|', mods = 'CTRL|SHIFT', action = wezterm.action.SplitHorizontal { domain = 'CurrentPaneDomain' } },
  { key = '_', mods = 'CTRL|SHIFT', action = wezterm.action.SplitVertical { domain = 'CurrentPaneDomain' } },
  -- 패널 이동
  { key = 'LeftArrow',  mods = 'ALT', action = wezterm.action.ActivatePaneDirection 'Left' },
  { key = 'RightArrow', mods = 'ALT', action = wezterm.action.ActivatePaneDirection 'Right' },
  { key = 'UpArrow',    mods = 'ALT', action = wezterm.action.ActivatePaneDirection 'Up' },
  { key = 'DownArrow',  mods = 'ALT', action = wezterm.action.ActivatePaneDirection 'Down' },
  -- 폰트 크기
  { key = '=', mods = 'CTRL', action = wezterm.action.IncreaseFontSize },
  { key = '-', mods = 'CTRL', action = wezterm.action.DecreaseFontSize },
  { key = '0', mods = 'CTRL', action = wezterm.action.ResetFontSize },
  -- 복사/붙여넣기
  { key = 'c', mods = 'CTRL|SHIFT', action = wezterm.action.CopyTo 'Clipboard' },
  { key = 'v', mods = 'CTRL|SHIFT', action = wezterm.action.PasteFrom 'Clipboard' },
}

-- Ctrl+1~9로 탭 직접 이동
for i = 1, 9 do
  table.insert(config.keys, {
    key = tostring(i), mods = 'ALT', action = wezterm.action.ActivateTab(i - 1),

end

content.text:
설정 완료. 주요 내용:

**복붙**
- `Ctrl+C` — 선택 영역 있으면 복사, 없으면 SIGINT(기존 동작)
- `Ctrl+V` — 클립보드 붙여넣기

**속도 최적화**
- `front_end = 'WebGpu'` — GPU 가속 렌더링
- `animation_fps = 1` — 불필요한 애니메이션 제거
- `max_fps = 120`
- 커서 블링크 이징 `Constant`로 처리비용 최소화

---

GitHub White 컬러스킴 물어보신 건, WezTerm에서 사용 가능한 밝은 테마를 찾아보겠습니다.

content.content:
Web search results for query: "wezterm color scheme GitHub Light 2026"

Links: [{"title":"Colors & Appearance - Wez's Terminal Emulator","url":"https://wezterm.org/config/appearance.html"},{"title":"wezterm-colorscheme · GitHub Topics · GitHub","url":"https://github.com/topics/wezterm-colorscheme"},{"title":"GitHub - gfguthrie/wezterm-canonical-solarized: Canonical Solarized color scheme for Wezterm","url":"https://github.com/gfguthrie/wezterm-canonical-solarized"},{"title":"GitHub - catppuccin/wezterm: :shell: Soothing pastel theme for WezTerm","url":"https://github.com/catppuccin/wezterm"},{"title":"Color Schemes with first letter \"g\" - Wez's Terminal Emulator","url":"https://wezterm.org/colorschemes/g/index.html"},{"title":"wezterm-themes · GitHub Topics · GitHub","url":"https://github.com/topics/wezterm-themes"},{"title":"Quick Theme Cycler (Light/Dark Mode aware) · wezterm/wezterm · Discussion #3426","url":"https://github.com/wezterm/wezterm/discussions/3426"},{"title":"Choose color scheme based on system's preferred theme · wezterm/wezterm · Discussion #6297","url":"https://github.com/wezterm/wezterm/discussions/6297"},{"title":"How to add colorscheme to Wezterm · wezterm/wezterm · Discussion #3850","url":"https://github.com/wezterm/wezterm/discussions/3850"},{"title":"How to get current color scheme? · wezterm/wezterm · Discussion #5024","url":"https://github.com/wezterm/wezterm/discussions/5024"}]

Based on the search results, I found information about the GitHub Light color scheme for WezTerm:

The "GitHub Light" scheme is also known as Github Light (Gogh). This is one of the built-in color schemes available in WezTerm.

To use the GitHub Light color scheme in WezTerm, you can add it to your `wezterm.lua` configuration file like this:

```lua
config.color_scheme = 'GitHub Light'
```

WezTerm includes this color scheme as a built-in option, which means you don't need to manually install or configure it separately. The scheme is sourced from the GitHub color schemes repository and is compatible with WezTerm's color configuration system.

If you want to customize it further, you can use the color_scheme option which takes precedence over the colors section, and if you want to merge/override colors you need to use wezterm.color.get_default_colors().


REMINDER: You MUST include the sources above in your response to the user using markdown hyperlinks.

How to add colorscheme to Wezterm · wezterm/wezterm · Discussion #3850
How to get current color scheme? · wezterm/wezterm · Discussion #5024

results:
Based on the search results, I found information about the GitHub Light color scheme for WezTerm:

The "GitHub Light" scheme is also known as Github Light (Gogh). This is one of the built-in color schemes available in WezTerm.

To use the GitHub Light color scheme in WezTerm, you can add it to your `wezterm.lua` configuration file like this:

```lua
config.color_scheme = 'GitHub Light'
```

WezTerm includes this color scheme as a built-in option, which means you don't need to manually install or configure it separately. The scheme is sourced from the GitHub color schemes repository and is compatible with WezTerm's color configuration system.

If you want to customize it further, you can use the color_scheme option which takes precedence over the colors section, and if you want to merge/override colors you need to use wezterm.color.get_default_colors().

content.thinking: WezTerm에 내장된 GitHub 관련 컬러스킴이 있습니다. 확인해보겠습니다.

content.text:
WezTerm에 GitHub 관련 라이트 스킴이 내장되어 있습니다. 사용 가능한 옵션:

- `'GitHub Light'` — GitHub 라이트
- `'Github (base16)'` — base16 버전
- `'Github Light (Gogh)'` — Gogh 포트

변경하려면 설정 파일에서 `color_scheme` 줄만 바꾸면 됩니다. 적용할까요? 아니면 지금 Tokyo Night(다크) 유지할까요?

Sources:
- [WezTerm Color Schemes - G](https://wezterm.org/colorschemes/g/index.html)
- [WezTerm Appearance Config](https://wezterm.org/config/appearance.html)

content.content: The file C:\Users\Administrator\.wezterm.lua has been updated successfully.

toolUseResult.originalFile:
local wezterm = require 'wezterm'
local config = wezterm.config_builder()

-- 폰트
config.font = wezterm.font('D2Coding', { weight = 'Regular' })
config.font_size = 12.0
config.line_height = 1.1

-- 컬러 스킴 (다크)
config.color_scheme = 'Tokyo Night'

-- 창 설정
config.window_background_opacity = 0.92
config.window_padding = { left = 8, right = 8, top = 4, bottom = 4 }
config.initial_cols = 130
config.initial_rows = 35
config.window_decorations = 'RESIZE'

-- 탭바
config.enable_tab_bar = true
config.use_fancy_tab_bar = false
config.tab_bar_at_bottom = true
config.hide_tab_bar_if_only_one_tab = true
config.tab_max_width = 30

-- 커서
config.default_cursor_style = 'SteadyBar'
config.cursor_blink_rate = 500

-- 스크롤
config.scrollback_lines = 10000
config.enable_scroll_bar = false

-- 속도 최적화
config.front_end = 'WebGpu'                    -- GPU 가속 렌더링
config.webgpu_power_preference = 'HighPerformance'
config.animation_fps = 1                        -- 불필요한 애니메이션 최소화
config.cursor_blink_ease_in = 'Constant'
config.cursor_blink_ease_out = 'Constant'
config.enable_wayland = false
config.max_fps = 120

-- 기본 쉘 (PowerShell 7)
config.default_prog = { 'pwsh', '-NoLogo' }

-- 키 바인딩
config.keys = {
  -- 탭 관리
  { key = 't', mods = 'CTRL|SHIFT', action = wezterm.action.SpawnTab 'CurrentPaneDomain' },
  { key = 'w', mods = 'CTRL|SHIFT', action = wezterm.action.CloseCurrentTab { confirm = true } },
  -- 탭 이동
  { key = 'LeftArrow',  mods = 'CTRL|SHIFT', action = wezterm.action.ActivateTabRelative(-1) },
  { key = 'RightArrow', mods = 'CTRL|SHIFT', action = wezterm.action.ActivateTabRelative(1) },
  -- 패널 분할
  { key = '|', mods = 'CTRL|SHIFT', action = wezterm.action.SplitHorizontal { domain = 'CurrentPaneDomain' } },
  { key = '_', mods = 'CTRL|SHIFT', action = wezterm.action.SplitVertical { domain = 'CurrentPaneDomain' } },
  -- 패널 이동
  { key = 'LeftArrow',  mods = 'ALT', action = wezterm.action.ActivatePaneDirection 'Left' },
  { key = 'RightArrow', mods = 'ALT', action = wezterm.action.ActivatePaneDirection 'Right' },
  { key = 'UpArrow',    mods = 'ALT', action = wezterm.action.ActivatePaneDirection 'Up' },
  { key = 'DownArrow',  mods = 'ALT', action = wezterm.action.ActivatePaneDirection 'Down' },
  -- 폰트 크기
  { key = '=', mods = 'CTRL', action = wezterm.action.IncreaseFontSize },
  { key = '-', mods = 'CTRL', action = wezterm.action.DecreaseFontSize },
  { key = '0', mods = 'CTRL', action = wezterm.action.ResetFontSize },
}

-- Ctrl+C / Ctrl+V: 선택 영역 있으면 복사, 없으면 원래 Ctrl+C(SIGINT) 동작
config.keys[#config.keys + 1] = {
  key = 'c', mods = 'CTRL',
  action = wezterm.action_callback(function(window, pane)
    local sel = window:get_selection_text_for_pane(pane)
    if sel and #sel > 0 then
      window:perform_action(wezterm.action.CopyTo 'Clipboard', pane)
    else
      window:perform_action(wezterm.action.SendKey { key = 'c', mods = 'CTRL' }, pane)
    end
  end),
}

config.keys[#config.keys + 1] = {
  key = 'v', mods = 'CTRL',
  action = wezterm.action.PasteFrom 'Clipboard',
}

-- Alt+1~9로 탭 직접 이동
for i = 1, 9 do
  table.insert(config.keys, {
    key = tostring(i), mods = 'ALT', action = wezterm.action.ActivateTab(i - 1),
  })
end

return config

content.text: `GitHub Light`로 변경 완료. WezTerm 재시작하면 적용됩니다.
